phenotype_to_guidance.Rapid Acetylator: Standard isoniazid dosing (typically 5 mg/kg/day for adults). Rapid acetylators may have lower drug levels; monitor for treatment efficacy.
phenotype_to_guidance.Intermediate Acetylator: Standard isoniazid dosing is generally appropriate. Monitor liver function tests as recommended.
phenotype_to_guidance.Slow Acetylator: Increased risk of isoniazid-induced hepatotoxicity and peripheral neuropathy. Consider dose reduction or enhanced monitoring. Co-administer pyridoxine (vitamin B6) to reduce neuropathy risk.
